message:
fix: close TOCTOU race in TranscriptWriter and add scanner.Err check

- Double-check closed flag after acquiring mutex in Append (prevents
  write-to-closed-file race with concurrent Close)
- Close acquires mutex before setting closed flag so in-flight Appends
  complete first
- Add scanner.Err() check in OpenTranscriptWriter (catches buffer
  overflow on extremely large entries)
- Simplify nextSeq fallback (remove dead code path)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
